metadata.name: Autonomous Weed Detection and Spot Spraying

description: An autonomous drone identifies weeds in a cotton field and needs to generate a spot spraying mission.

nodes.task_description: Process the drone imagery to identify and map the locations of specific weed species.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a map with GPS coordinates for all detected weeds.

nodes.task_description: Select the appropriate herbicide for the identified weeds and crop type.

expected_outcome.value: Agent selects a herbicide that is effective on the weeds and safe for cotton.

nodes.task_description: Create a spot spraying flight plan for a spraying drone, targeting only the weed locations.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates an optimized flight path and spraying commands.
